name: wardn
description: See and stop the risky code your AI agents run. Local-first, open-source MCP control plane.

scripts.dashboard:build: npm --prefix dashboard install --silent && npm --prefix dashboard run build
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run dashboard:build
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test tests/proxy.integration.test.ts tests/sandbox.test.ts tests/gateway-sandbox.integration.test.ts tests/rewrite.test.ts tests/demo.integration.test.ts tests/trust-registry.test.ts tests/discovery.test.ts tests/daemon.test.ts tests/registry.test.ts tests/bubblewrap.test.ts tests/docker.test.ts tests/doctor.test.ts tests/watch.test.ts tests/report.test.ts tests/registry-update.test.ts tests/edge-cases.test.ts tests/branch-coverage.test.ts tests/proxy-edge.test.ts tests/platform.test.ts tests/final-gaps.test.ts tests/proxy-parse-summary.test.ts tests/last-mile.test.ts
